diagnosis: The visible hero H1 is already in its settled page state, and repairContext reports no self, pseudo, child, or ScrollTrigger animation at or under it. The nearby clickable affordances are unrelated nav/reel controls, so there is no corrected selector or precondition that would make this capture measurable.

action.rationale: The target is visible and uncovered, but all local animatable signals are false and no stable nearby trigger controls this heading reveal.

abortCriterion: Stop unless a fresh map discovers a stable boot-capture path or an animatable child/ScrollTrigger bound to the hero heading.
